content.text: REVIEW-PASS: 5.6.1 / 5.6.3 — Review requested via system `SKStoreReviewController.requestReview(in:)` (ReviewManager.swift), no write-review deep links; the `apps.apple.com` link in ShareSheet.swift is a plain store page for sharing, not a review manipulation, and metadata contains no "rate 5 stars" language.
